name: fuelphp-tools
description: FuelPHP developer tools: clickable path links (View::forge, Asset::css/js/img, Config::load, Lang::load) and Route Runner

fuelpHPTools.domain.description: Base domain for Route Runner (e.g. http://localhost or https://dev.example.com). Leave empty to use FUELPHP_DOMAIN from .env

fuelpHPTools.viewsPath.description: Path to the FuelPHP views directory, relative to workspace root

fuelpHPTools.assetsPath.description: Path to the assets directory, relative to workspace root
